value_chain_position: CPU/NPU instruction-set architecture licensing — every mobile SoC, server CPU, AI inference chip and embedded controller pays ARM a royalty per unit shipped.
relative_comps: ARM's ISA is the de facto standard for mobile (>99% share) and is rapidly gaining in server CPUs (Graviton/NEOVERSE wins at AWS, Google, Microsoft). The shift to Armv9 doubles royalty rates vs Armv8, driving ASP expansion. RISC-V is an open-source alternative with growing momentum but zero production server deployments at scale. ARM trades at ~80x forward earnings — a significant premium justified by near-monopoly architecture leverage but leaving almost no margin for execution risk.
